overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit indoor commercial megastructure featuring a gym, vending machines, and food stalls, culminating in a dramatic view of a multi-level atrium. The environment features dense cyberpunk aesthetics with green, purple, and red neon lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley trash corridor with chain-link fence

events.description: passing through the chain-link fence gate into the interior space
exiting narrow corridor into the larger gym area

agents.ego_description: walking through a grimy trash-filled corridor and passing through a metal gate

notable_agents.action: person leaning against the chain-link fence in the corridor

entered.detail: metal mesh security fence with a gate opening
piles of garbage bags and scattered debris
bright green fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the corridor
grimy stained concrete pillars and walls

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow trash-filled back corridor with green neon lighting. The camera moves forward through a chain-link fence gate, passing a person leaning against the fence, and approaches the entrance to a larger interior space.

events.description: entering the open gym area from the narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the gym floor past various people exercising and weightlifting equipment

notable_agents.action: man performing bicep curls with dumbbells on a bench
person walking across the gym floor carrying weights

entered.detail: raised concrete platform with barbells and weight plates
large wall-mounted mirrors reflecting the gym interior
long fluorescent light fixtures hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious underground gym with concrete floors and overhead fluorescent lighting. Several people are working out on weightlifting platforms and benches. The camera moves past exercise equipment and gym-goers toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with vending machines and neon advertisements

events.description: shifting from green gym lighting to purple and blue neon illumination
approaching the food stall area with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking past brightly lit vending machines and advertisements toward a food service area

notable_agents.action: person standing at vending machine making a selection

entered.detail: row of illuminated vending machines with glowing product displays
bright purple commercial advertisement sign on the wall
stacked cardboard boxes and packaging materials

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the gym into a commercial corridor lit by purple and blue neon lights. The camera passes vending machines and scattered boxes while approaching a food stall area visible in the distance with red signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: 24-hour food stall with open kitchen counter

events.description: arriving at the food stall counter with steam rising from cooking equipment
pausing briefly to observe the food vendor working behind the counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stall and observing the vendor preparing meals behind the service counter

notable_agents.action: food vendor preparing meals behind the steamy counter
customer seated at table eating food

entered.detail: open kitchen counter with steam vapor and cooking woks
bright red neon sign with asian characters indicating 24-hour service
small metal table with chairs for customers

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a 24-hour food stall with a red neon sign and steam rising from the cooking area. A vendor works behind the counter while a customer eats at a nearby table. The scene is lit by warm artificial light from the kitchen.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level megastructure atrium with connecting staircases

events.description: beginning to ascend the concrete staircase
dialogue prompt appears asking 'What's going on?' indicating NPC interaction
stopping to look upward at the towering megastructure interior

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs through a corridor and then looking up at the massive multi-level atrium

notable_agents.action: person ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
tall multi-level building interior with multiple balconies and walkways
large glowing advertisement screen on the upper level walls
cable car wires traversing the open atrium space

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a darker corridor and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase. Upon reaching the upper level, the view opens into a massive multi-level atrium with holographic billboards, overhead cables, and multiple balconies visible. The camera stops to look upward at the towering structure extending toward a hazy skylight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grimy, narrow service corridor into a sprawling, multi-level cyberpunk atrium. It begins in a trash-filled alleyway bathed in green neon, moving through a chain-link gate and past a leaning figure before opening into a spacious underground gym filled with weightlifting equipment and concrete floors. As the camera exits the gym, the environment shifts into a commercial corridor illuminated by purple and blue neon, passing vending machines and boxes toward a food stall area. The scene then transitions into the warm, steamy glow of a 24-hour kitchen where a vendor works behind a red neon sign, before the camera moves through a darker passage to ascend a wide concrete staircase. Finally, the view expands upon reaching the upper level, revealing a massive atrium dominated by holographic billboards, overhead cables, and towering balconies that stretch toward a hazy skylight.
